zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_help: Left: backend LAN port, Right: zstd tunnel port
zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_invalid: Zstd port must be between 1024 and 65535
zstdnet.share_to_lan.port_unavailable: Zstd port is already in use
zstdnet.share_to_lan.write_failed: Failed to update zstdnet-server.properties before opening LAN.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_hint: Before opening your world to LAN, set the Zstd public port and the game port first. The game port may also be random.
zstdnet.singleplayer.lan_command_hint: If an advanced LAN mod does not show the Zstd UI, use /zstdport game <port>, /zstdport zstd <port>, /zstdport voice <port>, or /zstdport zstdvoice <port> to set the ports.
zstdnet.hud.host.title: ZstdNet Host %s %s:%s
zstdnet.hud.client.title: ZstdNet %s %s:%s
zstdnet.command.port.status: Current zstd port: %s, backend game port: %s.
zstdnet.command.port.no_permission: Only the local host with admin permission can change ZstdNet ports.
zstdnet.command.port.game_set_reopen: Set backend game port to %s. The world is already published to LAN, so reopen LAN for the change to fully take effect.
zstdnet.command.port.voice_status: Current voice public entry: %s, backend voice port: %s.
zstdnet.command.voice.no_permission: Only the local host with admin permission can change ZstdNet config.
